name: webscan
description: Web vulnerability scanner: SQLi, XSS, CSRF, IDOR, 403 bypass, open redirect, framework CVEs (Jira/AEM/Confluence), file upload detection, security headers
author: 0xb0rn3 | github.com/0xb0rn3

help.description: Scans web applications for common vulnerabilities based on OWASP Top 10 and bug bounty research. Checks security headers, tests for error-based and time-based SQL injection, reflected XSS, missing CSRF tokens, 403 bypass techniques, open redirect, file upload endpoints, and framework-specific CVEs for Jira, AEM, and Confluence.

url.description: Full URL including query parameters for SQLi/XSS testing (e.g. https://example.com/search?q=test)

sqli.description: Test for SQL injection (error-based and time-based blind). Requires URL with query parameters.

xss.description: Test for reflected XSS. Requires URL with query parameters.

csrf.description: Check for missing CSRF tokens in forms

bypass_403.description: Test 403 bypass techniques (header injection and path manipulation) on bypass_path

open_redirect.description: Test for open redirect via common redirect parameters

framework_cves.description: Check for Jira, AEM, and Confluence framework CVEs

file_upload.description: Detect file upload forms and common upload endpoints

rate_limit.description: Test whether rate limiting is enforced

cookies.description: Session cookies for authenticated scanning (format: key=value; key2=value2)

headers_str.description: Custom request headers (format: Header-Name: value; Header2: value2)

examples.description: Basic scan with security headers and framework CVE check
SQLi and XSS test on parameterized URL

features: SQL injection: error-based and time-based blind (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL)
Reflected XSS with context-aware payload testing
CSRF: detects missing anti-CSRF tokens in forms
403 bypass: header injection (X-Forwarded-For, X-Custom-IP-Authorization, etc.) and path tricks
Open redirect detection via common redirect parameters
Jira CVEs: CVE-2019-11581 (SSTI), CVE-2019-8451 (SSRF), CVE-2021-26086 (file read)
Security headers audit: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.
File upload endpoint and form detection
notes: AUTHORIZATION REQUIRED: Only scan applications you own or have explicit written permission to test
Set 'url' with query parameters for SQLi and XSS tests (target is the base URL)
Time-based SQLi tests add 3-second delays per payload per parameter — expect slower scans
framework_cves sends requests to known Jira/AEM/Confluence paths regardless of detection
Use cookies parameter for authenticated scanning
